8 CRTDDT CREATED_DT Created Date DATE 8 For OASIS and MDS Assessments, it is the date the record submitted was saved to the state database. Otherwise it is the date that the options were entered into the system.
9 EFFCTVDT EFFECTIVE_DT Effective Date (Determines Year of Assessment) DATE 8 This date determines the year of the assessment. For MDS, the effective date is based on the (AA8A) Primary Reason for Assessment
